title: agriophyllum squarrosum
intro: Agriophyllum squarrosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae, commonly found in arid regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agriophyllum squarrosum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Agriophyllum squarrosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for use in traditional remedies.
